commit.subject: LU-13063 tests: fortestonly RHEL8.0 vs 8.1
commit.message:
LU-13063 tests: fortestonly RHEL8.0 vs 8.1

Collect results for RHEL8.0 and 8.1 testing.

This is to collect results/for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes clientdistro=el8.1 serverdistro=el7.7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full fstype=ldiskfs
